positive: A minimalist line art illustration of a playful fox sitting amongst stylized crescent moons and stars. The design must be clean, simple, and suitable for stamping or embroidery. Use only black ink on a white background. Scandinavian flat design aesthetic, single-line drawing, perfect for children's merchandise.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
